title: First Meeting
description: The day everything changed. Two people met without knowing they would eventually become family.

title: First Conversation
description: Hours passed like minutes. We talked about dreams, families, and the little things that make life beautiful.

title: First Photo Together
description: Our first captured moment — awkward smiles, genuine happiness, and the beginning of countless memories.

title: First Eid Together
description: Celebrating together for the first time. New clothes, sweet moments, and the warmth of shared traditions.

title: First Gift
description: A small token of affection that meant the world. It wasn't about the gift — it was about the thought behind it.

title: Difficult Times We Overcame
description: Every relationship faces storms. We learned that love isn't about never falling — it's about always rising together.

title: First Family Introduction
description: Nervous hearts, warm welcomes, and the moment our families became one story.

title: Engagement / Akd
description: The promise was made official. Two families united, two hearts pledged forever.

title: Wedding Preparations
description: Shopping, planning, dreaming — every detail woven with love and excitement for our new beginning.

title: Wedding Day
description: The day we become one. Nine years of love culminating in a forever promise.
